title: chore(deps): update assistant ui

similarOrDuplicatePRs.relevance: Previous iteration of the same recurring Renovate update, merged 2026-02-11

summary: Renovate bot patch update of @assistant-ui packages: @assistant-ui/react 0.12.10→0.12.11, @assistant-ui/react-markdown 0.12.3→0.12.4, @assistant-ui/react-syntax-highlighter 0.12.3→0.12.4. Changes span playground-ui/package.json, client-sdks/react/package.json, a changeset file, and pnpm-lock.yaml.
maintainerNotes: PR is approved but has merge conflicts and CI failures (Core, E2E, Memory, Full Test Suite). The conflicts are likely due to lockfile drift since this was opened 14 days ago. Needs a rebase against main to resolve conflicts and re-run CI. The test failures may also be pre-existing/flaky rather than caused by these patch bumps. A newer Renovate PR may supersede this one if the branch is rebased.
